name: Lunara: Planet IX
short_description: Build and explore in Planet IX, a vibrant 2D pixel art simulation game where you create a colony on a mysterious planet, face monsters, and uncover secrets while managing resources and oxygen.
detailed_description:
Overview



Discover Planet IX, a new and mysterious world that challenges everything we know about the universe! Hidden for ages behind the sun, this twin brother of Earth has finally been revealed thanks to technological advancements. Sharing the same habitable zone, day and night cycle, and mass as Earth, Planet IX, or Lunara as its native inhabitants call it, is a new horizon for humanity.


While scientists were exploring this new world, teaching the Lunarians our language, a catastrophe struck Earth: the Moon was mysteriously destroyed. With debris threatening life on Earth, the scientific team rushed back to save the survivors, leaving behind Emylia, a dedicated civil engineer. With the help of the AI GP.To, Emylia commits to building a safe colony for the last survivors of Earth.

Gameplay Mechanics




Planet IX is a topdown 2D pixel art game with an open world that offers infinite freedom to the player.

Decoration and Construction:
  • Decorate and build both the interior and exterior of houses as you wish.
  • Construct essential structures such as schools, power plants, houses, and hospitals.

Mining and Crafting:

  • Mine, chop wood, and craft essential items for the survival and expansion of the colony.

Farming:
  • Grow food to sustain the colony.

Combat:

  • Fight monsters and explore mines and dungeons known as the Ancestral Labyrinth.

RPG System:
  • Develop attributes such as Attack, Defense, Critical, and Luck to strengthen your character.

Technology and Theme:
  • A mix of advanced and medieval archaic technologies.

Day and Night System:

  • Experience different climates and seasons throughout the game.

Oxygen Management:
  • Manage oxygen, which is consumed periodically. Failure to recharge results in loss of random items and loss of consciousness.

Interaction with Lunarians:
  • Trade items in the Lunarian Valley city, located northwest of the colony.

Domestication:
  • Domesticate animals and ancestral robots to help you with tasks and battles.

Future of the Game



After the release, Planet IX will continue to expand. New territories, objectives, mechanics, and stories will be added, providing an ever-growing and engaging experience for players.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic, Hindi
